name: Baker's Creek Park
description: Come play pickleball at Baker's Creek Park in Kannapolis, NC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Carolina Pickleball Club Kannapolis
description:
Welcome to Carolina Pickleball Club – Kannapolis
Located in the heart of downtown Kannapolis, CPBC’s second flagship facility is a premier indoor pickleball destination designed for players of all levels. Featuring 10 dedicated indoor courts with professional-grade surfaces, a 2,500 square foot social lounge, and a sleek pro shop, this location blends competition and community in one dynamic space.

Whether you’re dropping in for open play, leveling up in one of our clinics, or attending a signature event, CPBC Kannapolis delivers an unmatched experience with climate-controlled courts, clean amenities, and friendly staff. Host your next private event, join a league, or simply rally with friends — this is where pickleball meets lifestyle.

Come for the game. Stay for the vibe.

name: Dan Nicholas Park
description: Dan Nicholas Park is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, NC. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Ellis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Ellis Park in Salisbury, NC! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Hall Gymnasium
description: Hall Gymnasium is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, NC. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the court. The court is free.

name: JF Hurley YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at JF Hurley YMCA in Salisbury, NC! There are 15 asphalt and wood courts. 9 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.

name: Salisbury City Park
description: Salisbury City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salisbury, NC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Trading Ford Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Trading Ford Baptist Church in Salisbury, NC! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
